languages.text: {n}До вас доносится тихое пренебрежительное фырканье.{/n} "Эта застава не стоит даже снаряда, который ее уничтожит, но раз ты настаиваешь..."
{n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."
languages.original_text: {n}До вас доносится тихое пренебрежительное фырканье.{/n} "Эта застава не стоит даже снаряда, который ее уничтожит, но раз ты настаиваешь..."

traits.locale_text: {n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."
{n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."
{n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."

languages.text: {n}Un resoplido quedo y despectivo llega a tus oídos.{/n} «Ese puesto no merece ni la munición que costará destruirlo, pero si insiste...».
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un resoplido quedo y despectivo llega a tus oídos.{/n} «Ese puesto no merece ni la munición que costará destruirlo, pero si insiste...».

languages.text: {n}你听到一声轻蔑的冷哼。{/n}“那个哨站根本不值得浪费一枚炮弹，不过既然你坚持……”
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."

traits.locale_text: {n}你听到一声轻蔑的冷哼。{/n}“那个哨站根本不值得浪费一枚炮弹，不过既然你坚持……”

languages.text: {n}Un petit grognement méprisant parvient à vos oreilles.{/n} « Ce poste ne vaut même pas le missile nécessaire à sa destruction, mais si vous insistez... »
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un petit grognement méprisant parvient à vos oreilles.{/n} « Ce poste ne vaut même pas le missile nécessaire à sa destruction, mais si vous insistez... »

languages.text: {n}Sessiz ve küçümseyici burun çekişi, kulaklarına ulaşıyor.{/n} "O karakol onu yok etmek için harcanacak mermiye bile değmez ama ısrar ediyorsanız..."
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sessiz ve küçümseyici burun çekişi, kulaklarına ulaşıyor.{/n} "O karakol onu yok etmek için harcanacak mermiye bile değmez ama ısrar ediyorsanız..."

languages.text: {n}Ein leises, verächtliches Schnauben erreicht deine Ohren.{/n} "Dieser Posten ist die Granate nicht wert, die man braucht, um ihn zu zerstören, aber wenn Ihr darauf besteht ..."
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein leises, verächtliches Schnauben erreicht deine Ohren.{/n} "Dieser Posten ist die Granate nicht wert, die man braucht, um ihn zu zerstören, aber wenn Ihr darauf besteht ..."

languages.text: {n}静かに、鼻を鳴らす音が聞こえてきた。{/n}「その投稿は、破壊するのに必要なシェルすら価値がない。でも、君がどうしてもと言うなら…」
languages.original_text: {n}A quiet, dismissive snort reaches your ears.{/n} "That post isn't even worth the shell it would take to destroy it, but if you insist..."
